description: Style NoteThese low-top rustic shoes from buckaroo blend vintage cowboy styling with a contemporary minimal trend. These classic four-hole lace ups with a leather inner give off a subtly stylish vibe. Style this pair with denims or corduroy trousers and a casual check shirtProduct Details Low-top leather upper with strategically placed overlay on the heelStitch detailing along the seams of the toe boxFour-hole central lace ups with a padded tongueSoft insole for in-step comfortOutsole reinforced onto the upper at the heelRubber midsole and a TPU outsole with a curved midfoot and tyre tread patterningMaterial and CareLeatherUse a leather brush to remove dustDo not store under sunlight
